small warning: alternate timeline (ink machine summary worked and nothing went wrong in the studio) and maybe it will be very smut quickly, during testing, but I hope you like it

Hello, sorry for disappearing again, it's again and again, finally there's a new bot for you! I had finished the bot one morning but the website decided to have problems with the answers and it was buggy so I decided not to post it and only post it when I had an agreement, anyway I hope the answers aren't too dramatic or written in a way that it wasn't supposed to be (I recommend you generate the bot's answer almost this happens and write in third person, during testing the bot didn't write for me but remember this always depends on the way you write and the size of your answers)
